Name: ClickOnce - Create from deployed package
Description: Create binaries manifest & CO application and sign them with given code sign certificate ... using mage.exe.

Parameters.Name: DeployStepName
Parameters.Label: Deploy step to read binaries from
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the previous step used to deploy binaries that will be packed in CO package

Parameters.Name: DestinationPath
Parameters.Label: Path to the directory where to deploy the ClickOnce package
Parameters.HelpText: Path to the target directory for the ClickOnce package. This will contain the created *.application file and the "Application Files" folder

Parameters.Name: ExeFileName
Parameters.Label: Name of the target executable file
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the executable file of the application to pack

Parameters.Name: Publisher
Parameters.Label: Publisher name
Parameters.HelpText: Publisher name to use when creating the CO package

Parameters.Name: SignCertFilePath
Parameters.Label: Path to the certification file
Parameters.HelpText: Path to the certification pfx file

Parameters.Name: MageExePath
Parameters.Label: Path to mage.exe
Parameters.HelpText: Path to mage.exe which is used to update manifest and .application files and sign them.

Parameters.Name: IconFile
Parameters.Label: Icon filename
Parameters.HelpText: Name of icon file in the package, eg. ApplicationIcon.ico

Parameters.Name: DisplayName
Parameters.Label: Application display name
Parameters.HelpText: Name which appears in the Start Menu
